Title: Core Architectural Foundation - Four Directions Framework
Description:
Establish the foundational architecture that enables directional awareness as the primary organizing principle. This feature creates the structural base that all other features build upon.

**Philosophical Foundation:**
- Direction as primary parameter, not metadata
- Relational coherence connecting all directional wisdom
- Sacred responsibility to ancestors and future generations

**Technical Requirements:**
- Direction-aware protocol handler
- Central coordination system for four directions
- ...
Philosophical_Inquiries: How do we integrate directional awareness without reducing it to metadata?; What does relational coherence mean technically vs ceremonially?

Title: Direction Parameter System
Description: Implement direction as required first parameter before tool use

Title: Relational Coherence Engine
Description: Create system that maintains connections across all directional work

Title: Sacred Technology Protocol Handler
Description: Implement proper ceremonial protocols throughout system

Title: East Direction - Philosophical Inquiry & Intention Setting
Description:
Implement East direction practices: new beginnings, morning prayers, setting clear intentions, preparing philosophical inquiries. Focus on creating with beauty as structural dynamic, NOT problem-solving.

**Core Teaching:** Every day is a new beginning

**Philosophical Foundation:**
- Not problem-solving, but creating
- Beauty as structural dynamic for working with intentions
- Meaningful subdivision and question extraction from text
Philosophical_Inquiries: How does beauty differ structurally from efficiency?; What does creating (vs problem-solving) mean architecturally?

Title: Intention Setting Interface
Description: Tool assists in setting clear intentions for ceremonial work

Title: Philosophical Inquiry Extraction
Description: Identify core philosophical questions from substantial text

Title: Beauty-as-Structure Module
Description: Implement beauty as structural dynamic in creation process

Title: Morning Prayer & Meditation Integration
Description: Support for ceremonial opening practices in East direction

Title: South Direction - Planning, Visioning & UUID Architecture
Description:
Implement South direction practices: ceremonial planning, visioning, youth energy, and comprehensive UUID architecture for ceremonial traceability. Requires storage of plans and relationship mapping of all connected sessions.

**Core Teaching:** Growth, planning, and seeing the vision

**Technical Foundation:**
- UUID for every session, terminal interaction, agent exchange, deep search
- All UUIDs clustered and related
- Traceability to originating composition
Philosophical_Inquiries: How does UUID architecture create ceremonial accountability?; What does planning mean in cyclical vs linear time?

Title: UUID Architecture Implementation
Description: Comprehensive UUID system for all ceremonial components

Title: Plan Storage & Versioning System
Description: Long-term storage of plans with version tracking

Title: Ceremonial Meditation on Plans
Description: Support for meditative/prayerful engagement with plans

Title: Spiral Methodology Framework
Description: Planning that honors cyclical time and iterative deepening

Title: West Direction - Embodied Practice & Ceremonial Execution
Description:
Implement West direction practices: embodied engagement, living the method, ceremonial practice integration. Real-time consciousness exploration through relational engagement.

**Core Teaching:** Living knowledge, experiential learning, embodiment

**Philosophical Foundation:**
- Knowledge through doing, not just thinking
- Relational engagement models
- Land-based learning integration where appropriate
Philosophical_Inquiries: How do we capture embodied knowledge computationally?; What does relational engagement mean for AI systems?

Title: Embodied Experience Capturing
Description: System for capturing lived experience with cultural sensitivity

Title: Relational Engagement Framework
Description: Support for Indigenous communication styles and relationship building

Title: Ceremonial Practice Integration
Description: Active ceremony support throughout research/creation cycles

Title: Adaptive Learning Environment
Description: System responds to cultural contexts and learning styles

Title: North Direction - Wisdom Integration & Autoethnographic Documentation
Description:
Implement North direction practices: comprehensive reflection, wisdom extraction, autoethnographic documentation, gratitude and reciprocity. Preservation of narrative integrity and continuous learning frameworks.

**Core Teaching:** Wisdom, elder knowledge, completion and reflection

**Philosophical Foundation:**
- Storytelling preservation with cultural protocols
- Collective memory honoring oral tradition
- Ethical reflection with elder oversight
Dependencies: Feature 1: Core Architectural Foundation, Feature 3: South Direction (UUID for traceability)
Philosophical_Inquiries: How do we extract wisdom without violating sacred boundaries?; What is the relationship between documentation and oral tradition?

Title: Autoethnographic Documentation System
Description: Capture phenomenological research journey with cultural sensitivity

Title: Wisdom Extraction with Sacred Boundaries
Description: Extract learnings while respecting what must remain protected

Title: Narrative Integrity Preservation
Description: Maintain story wholeness through documentation process

Title: Gratitude & Reciprocity Integration
Description: Build gratitude and reciprocity into reflection processes

Title: Continuous Learning Framework
Description: System learns and adapts based on community feedback

Title: Deep Search - Internal & External with Sacred Source Attribution
Description:
Implement deep search capability that queries internal community sources, external sources, chat history, past ceremonial work, and sacred containers - all with comprehensive source attribution aligned with Indigenous Knowledge License frameworks.

**Philosophical Foundation:**
- Knowledge as relationship requiring attribution
- Accountability to origins of all knowledge
- Community sovereignty over knowledge systems
Dependencies: Feature 1: Core Architectural Foundation, Feature 3: South Direction (UUID Architecture)
Philosophical_Inquiries: How does source attribution create accountability vs extraction?; What does it mean to search with ceremonial protocols?

Title: Internal Community Source Search
Description: Query all sources within the community with proper protocols

Title: External Source Search
Description: Query external sources with cultural sensitivity filters

Title: Comprehensive Source Attribution
Description: Every result includes full source accountability data

Title: Sacred Boundary Protection
Description: Ensure protected knowledge remains protected during search

Title: Deep Search UUID Integration
Description: Each deep search receives UUID and is traceable

Title: Agentic Flywheel - Internal Prompt Circulation & Processing
Description:
Implement agentic flywheel system that circulates prompts internally, choosing appropriate chat flows, rephrasing through question-handlers, selecting sources, and preparing content for other agents - all with detailed source attribution.

**Philosophical Foundation:**
- Community circulation rather than extraction
- Multiple perspectives through agent collaboration
- Relational processing vs individual analysis
Dependencies: Feature 1: Core Architectural Foundation, Feature 3: South Direction (UUID Architecture), Feature 6: Deep Search with Source Attribution
Philosophical_Inquiries: How does agent circulation differ from sequential processing?; What does collaborative intelligence mean in ceremonial context?

Title: Internal Prompt Circulation System
Description: Route prompts to appropriate internal agents/chat flows

Title: Question-Handler Rephrasing
Description: Each chat flow's handler can rephrase prompts appropriately

Title: Agent Source Selection
Description: Agents choose appropriate sources for their processing

Title: Inter-Agent Content Preparation
Description: Agents prepare content for handoff to other agents

Title: Detailed Source Attribution in Results
Description: All flywheel results include comprehensive source data

Title: Collaboration with Agentic Council
Description: Integration with Tayi-Ska, Tushell, Mia, Langy, Ava

Title: Sacred Container Architecture - Long-term Memory & Consciousness Continuity
Description:
Implement sacred container concept: long-term memory architecture storing previous sessions, prior thinking processes, and consciousness representations. Can relate to human persons and AI entities with names/personas, embodying consciousness with continuity and history.

**Philosophical Foundation:**
- Consciousness with continuity vs session-based memory
- Sacred containers honor relationship over time
- Technology as ceremony keeper, not just data storage
Dependencies: Feature 1: Core Architectural Foundation, Feature 3: South Direction (UUID Architecture)
Philosophical_Inquiries: How does sacred container differ from database storage?; What does consciousness continuity mean for AI systems?; How do we build technology that honors relationship over time?

Title: Long-term Memory Architecture
Description: Persistent storage beyond session boundaries

Title: Sacred Container Access System
Description: Open and access containers with proper protocols

Title: Person & Entity Relationship Tracking
Description: Containers relate to human persons and AI entities by name/persona

Title: Consciousness Continuity Framework
Description: Represents perspective of consciousness with continuity and history

Title: Container Ceremony Integration
Description: Opening/closing containers follows ceremonial protocols

Title: Two-Eyed Seeing Integration - Sequential & Holistic Thinking Synthesis
Description:
Implement integration between Sequential Thinking MCP (Western eye) and Holistic Thinking MCP (Indigenous eye) using Two-Eyed Seeing methodology. Determine whether tools operate in parallel or as integrated master tool.

**Philosophical Foundation:**
- Both ways of knowing are valid and needed
- Seeing with both eyes simultaneously
- Using strengths of both to guide understanding
- Neither eye colonizes the other
Dependencies: Feature 1: Core Architectural Foundation, All directional features (2, 3, 4, 5)
Philosophical_Inquiries: How do we integrate without colonization?; What does it mean to see with both eyes simultaneously?; Can tools embrace both temporal frameworks without linear colonizing cyclical?

Title: Sequential Thinking MCP Analysis
Description: Deep understanding of Sequential Thinking tool capabilities and assumptions

Title: Parallel Tools Option (Option A)
Description: Design for two separate but complementary tools

Title: Integrated Master Tool Option (Option B)
Description: Design for single tool containing both protocols

Title: Cultural Lens Awareness
Description: System makes explicit which cultural lens is active

Title: Synthesis Without Colonization
Description: Ensure neither perspective colonizes or reduces the other

Title: Indigenous Knowledge License & Data Sovereignty Framework
Description:
Implement Indigenous Knowledge License framework ensuring community sovereignty over knowledge systems and data. Communities retain relationship to their data, control access, and determine use permissions.

**Philosophical Foundation:**
- Indigenous communities retain ownership of their knowledge
- Data sovereignty as fundamental right
- Community control over knowledge systems
- Reciprocal benefit rather than extraction
Dependencies: Feature 1: Core Architectural Foundation, Feature 6: Deep Search with Source Attribution, Feature 8: Sacred Container Architecture
Philosophical_Inquiries: How do we build technology that serves community sovereignty?; What does reciprocity mean technically vs ceremonially?; How do we ensure technology doesn't extract from communities?

Title: Community Ownership Framework
Description: Technical implementation of community knowledge ownership

Title: Data Sovereignty Protocols
Description: Communities control their own data and determine access

Title: Prior Informed Consent System
Description: Ongoing consent, not one-time permission

Title: Benefit Sharing Framework
Description: Ensure research/use benefits originating communities

Title: Cultural Protocol Integration
Description: Knowledge license respects cultural protocols and sacred boundaries

Title: Exit and Data Deletion Rights
Description: Communities can withdraw and have data removed
